title: Wraith Waystone Towers
body:
A port of [Waystone Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystone-towers) to a datapack for newer versions. Only compatible with [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones).

This is a simple datapack adding Towers to the game that were inspired by [Towers Of The Wild](https://modrinth.com/datapack/towers-of-the-wild-reworked). They have a waystone on top, as well as two lootable chests.
There are 4 variants of vanilla-friendly towers that can generate. See the gallery for more information.
